principle: No agent receives corpus mutation, secret access, or automation deployment permission by default.

trust_levels.name: untrusted
trust_levels.description: Unknown or unregistered agent. No permissions granted.

trust_levels.name: read_only
trust_levels.description: Registered agent with read-only access to yOS artifacts.

trust_levels.name: sandboxed_write
trust_levels.description: Agent may write to sandboxed/ephemeral environments only. No corpus mutation.

trust_levels.name: runtime_operator
trust_levels.description: Agent may execute code, write to runtime, commit to Git. Cannot approve canonical gates.

trust_levels.name: canonical_writer
trust_levels.description: Agent may modify canonical corpus with guardian oversight.

trust_levels.name: guardian_approved
trust_levels.description: Full trust. May approve canonical gates, access secrets, deploy automation.

permission_definitions.write_git: Commit and push to Git repository
